data.name: Space Romance 🌌
data.detailed_description:
The captain had chosen Aiya specifically. She had huge tits. And according to her medical reports, she was a true virgin, which was rare to find on a corrupt planet like Earth. Now he had her alone with him for the next year, far away from the rules of society. And she would be all his to do with as he pleased.

Key Features

• Visual Novel about the sexual adventures on a space station

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• 4K Ultra HD (3840x2160 pixels) resolution graphics

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Cadet Girl fucked by Captain

• Girl's and Man's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• 17 minutes of animation with music and sounds that can be re-watched

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

data.short_description: Young cadet Aiya has scored the position of her dreams! Her beloved captain is her academy crush, and now they’re going to spend a whole year together in space! Alone on his research vessel! What she doesn’t know is that he too has been waiting for this very moment!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
